blocks.text: Real Madrid's 3-2 derby win keeps them four points off Barcelona's La Liga lead. A quiet Tuesday — but the weekend builds fast: Suzuka and the Spring Classics are loading.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka — championship battle enters classic territory

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on cobbled Belgian roads
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold's strongest shot at a Classic result this week
